mapper.sql: n.id, n.user_id, n.type, n.title, n.content, n.is_read, n.related_id, n.create_time, n.read_time
mapper.select: SELECT , u.username FROM notification n LEFT JOIN user u ON n.user_id = u.id WHERE n.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY n.create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification n WHERE n.user_id = #{userId} AND n.is_read = 0
SELECT FROM notification n WHERE n.user_id IS NULL ORDER BY n.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification (user_id, type, title, content, is_read, related_id, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{content}, #{isRead}, #{relatedId}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE notification SET user_id = #{userId}, type = #{type}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, is_read = #{isRead}, related_id = #{relatedId}, read_time = #{readTime} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE notification SET is_read = 1, read_time = #{readTime} WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
